title: helichrysum noeanum
intro: Helichrysum noeanum, a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae), is native to the mountainous regions of Greece and is also known as the 'Corsican helichrysum' or 'Greek helichrysum'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum noeanum include its potential to aid in the reduction of inflammation, improvement of wound healing, and relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Helichrysum noeanum are often used to create teas, essential oils, and salves, which are utilized to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
